sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَتَنَاوَلَ الْفَوَاكِهَ وَالْخُضْرَاوَاتِ الطَّازَجَةَ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Moramo svakodnevno jesti svježe voće i povrće.
sentences.translationEn: We must eat fresh fruits and vegetables daily.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةُ عَلَى الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ لِلنُّمُوِّ.
sentences.translation: Ove namirnice sadrže vitamine neophodne za rast.
sentences.translationEn: These foods contain essential vitamins for growth.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضَّلُ تَقْلِيلُ السُّكَّرِ وَالدُّهُونِ فِي الْوَجَبَاتِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Preporučuje se smanjenje šećera i masti u brzoj hrani.
sentences.translationEn: It is preferable to reduce sugar and fats in fast food.
